Package io.foldright.wrain

Interface Attachable

  • @ParametersAreNonnullByDefault
@ReturnValuesAreNonnullByDefault
public interface Attachable
    This Attachable interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, provide the attachment storage ability.

    All instance method names prefix "wrain" to avoid potential name conflict with subclass method names.

    Retrieve the attachment from wrapper chain(wrapper instances implement interface Wrapper) by Wrapper.getAttachment(Object, String) static method.

    Author:
    Jerry Lee (oldratlee at gmail dot com)
    See Also:
    Wrapper.getAttachment(Object, String)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      <V> V wrainGet​(String key)
      Get the attachment of the given key.
      void wrainSet​(String key, Object value)
      Sets an attachment.

    • Method Detail

      • wrainSet

        void wrainSet​(String key,
              Object value)
        Sets an attachment.
        Parameters:
        key - attachment key
        value - attachment value

      • wrainGet

        @Nullable
<V> V wrainGet​(String key)
        Get the attachment of the given key.
        Type Parameters:
        V - attachment value type
        Parameters:
        key - attachment key
        Returns:
        return attachment value, or null if contains no attachment for the key
